deployedGeneratedSources.name: #utility.yul

documentation.text:
@title NebulaStorage
 @notice Immutable on-chain registry of encrypted file CIDs.
         Meta-transaction pattern (EIP-191 personal_sign):
         - User signs a message off-chain (FREE — no gas)
         - Backend relays the transaction and pays gas
         - Contract recovers the signer address via ecrecover
         - Recovered address is stored as the file owner
         Result: on-chain ownership is the REAL user wallet,
         users never pay gas, backend wallet is just a relay.
@dev Replay-protection: track used nonces per user address
@notice Soft-delete a file. Also requires a user signature (gasless).

@notice Standard upload where msg.sender IS the owner (user pays gas).
         Kept as a fallback if user prefers direct signing.

params._deadline: Unix timestamp after which the signature expires
params._ipfsHash: IPFS CID of the encrypted file
params._signature: 65-byte ECDSA signature from the user's wallet

nonces.details: Replay-protection: track used nonces per user address

deleteFileMeta(uint256,address,uint256,u.notice: Soft-delete a file. Also requires a user signature (gasless).

uploadFile(string,string).notice: Standard upload where msg.sender IS the owner (user pays gas).         Kept as a fallback if user prefers direct signing.

uploadFileMeta(string,string,address,uin.notice: Register a file on-chain using a user-signed meta-transaction.         The backend calls this function and pays gas.         The user's wallet is recovered from the signature and stored as owner.

userdoc.notice: Immutable on-chain registry of encrypted file CIDs.         Meta-transaction pattern (EIP-191 personal_sign):         - User signs a message off-chain (FREE — no gas)         - Backend relays the transaction and pays gas         - Contract recovers the signer address via ecrecover         - Recovered address is stored as the file owner         Result: on-chain ownership is the REAL user wallet,         users never pay gas, backend wallet is just a relay.
